title: Isosceles triangles
description: You are given a regular polygon with $n$ vertices. You should find the number of isosceles triangles with vertices that are the vertices of the polygon.
input: The only line of input contains one integer $n$ --- the number of vertices of a regular polygon ($3 \le n \le 10^9$).
output: The output line should contain a single integer --- the number of isosceles triangles with vertices that are the vertices of the polygon.
hint: An isosceles triangle is a triangle that has at least two equal sides.
source: Olympiad, Russian Olympiad in Informatics, Russia Team High School Programming Contest, Russia Team High School Programming Contest 2019
